justification: PROMO-2026-Q1-004 ended 2025-10-27; this claim covers 8,500 units scanned 2025-10-28 through 2025-11-17, entirely outside the promotional period. Contract section 2.3 limits scan allowances to units scanned within the promo period. The valid in-window volume (11,180 units) was already settled and paid under deduction VM-90126 (settlement SH-2026-Q1-002). Deny.
